item.title: Sona BLW Precision Forgings Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Rising Market Momentum
item.description: Sona BLW Precision Forgings Ltd (SONACOMS) has witnessed a notable surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, signalling increased market participation and potential directional bets. The stock outperformed its sector and broader indices, supported by rising volumes and delivery volumes, indicating growing investor confidence in the auto components space. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Polycab India Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amidst Price Weakness
item.description: Polycab India Ltd has witnessed a notable surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity despite the stock’s recent underperformance. The increase in open interest by 11.8% alongside rising volumes suggests evolving market positioning and potential directional bets amid a challenging price environment. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Dalmia Bharat Ltd Sees Significant Open Interest Surge Amidst Mixed Market Signals
item.description: Dalmia Bharat Ltd (DALBHARAT), a key player in the Cement & Cement Products sector, has witnessed a notable surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, signalling increased market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite the stock’s recent outperformance relative to its sector, technical indicators and fundamental scores suggest a cautious outlook for investors. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: APL Apollo Tubes Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Price Action
item.description: APL Apollo Tubes Ltd (APLAPOLLO), a prominent player in the Iron & Steel Products sector, witnessed a notable 13.46% surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment on 11 Mar 2026. This sharp increase in OI, coupled with rising volumes and shifting market positioning, signals heightened investor activity and potential directional bets amid a backdrop of recent price weakness and sector underperformance. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Astral Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Strong Price Momentum
item.description: Astral Ltd, a key player in the Plastic Products - Industrial sector, has witnessed a significant surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. The stock’s recent price strength, coupled with increased volumes and rising delivery participation, suggests a growing bullish sentiment among traders and investors alike. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Manaksia Aluminium Company Ltd Surges to Upper Circuit on Strong Buying Momentum
item.description: Manaksia Aluminium Company Ltd witnessed a robust surge in its share price on 11 Mar 2026, hitting the upper circuit limit of 5%, closing at ₹28.67. This sharp rally was driven by intense buying pressure, reflecting renewed investor interest in the non-ferrous metals micro-cap amid a broader market downturn. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Adani Total Gas Ltd Surges to Upper Circuit on Robust Buying Pressure
item.description: Adani Total Gas Ltd (ATGL) witnessed a remarkable surge on 11 Mar 2026, hitting its upper circuit limit with a 19.99% gain to close at ₹566.90. The stock’s strong performance was driven by intense buying interest, resulting in a maximum permissible daily price rise and a significant trading volume of over 1,009 crore rupees, underscoring heightened investor enthusiasm amid a volatile market backdrop. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: KEI Industries Sees Significant Open Interest Surge Amid Price Weakness
item.description: KEI Industries Ltd has witnessed a notable 13.3% rise in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling increased market activity despite the stock’s recent underperformance. This surge in open interest, coupled with volume patterns and price movements, suggests evolving market positioning and potential directional bets among traders. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Hindustan Petroleum Sees Significant Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: Hindustan Petroleum Corporation Ltd. (HINDPETRO) has witnessed a notable 12.34% increase in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. This surge, coupled with volume patterns and price movements, offers critical insights into potential directional bets and the stock’s near-term outlook within the oil sector. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Mid-Cap Segment Faces Pressure as BSE MIDCAP 150 Declines Amid Mixed Stock Upgrades
item.description: The mid-cap segment, represented by the BSE MIDCAP 150 index, has experienced a modest decline of 0.87% today, extending its five-day slide to 1.89%. Despite this recent softness, the segment continues to display pockets of strength with select stocks upgrading their technical outlooks and delivering notable returns, underscoring a nuanced market environment for mid-cap investors. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Apollo Pipes Ltd Surges on Heavy Value Trading and Institutional Interest
item.description: Apollo Pipes Ltd witnessed a remarkable surge in trading activity on 11 Mar 2026, emerging as one of the highest value stocks on the bourses. The stock rallied 13.7% intraday, driven by robust volumes and heightened institutional participation, outperforming its sector and broader market indices significantly. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Omkar Speciality Chemicals Ltd Hits Lower Circuit Amid Heavy Selling Pressure
item.description: Shares of Omkar Speciality Chemicals Ltd plunged to their lower circuit limit on 11 Mar 2026, tumbling 4.77% to close at ₹3.99, just 0.25% above its 52-week low of ₹3.98. The stock underperformed its sector and broader market peers amid intense selling pressure and a sharp decline in investor participation, signalling mounting concerns among shareholders. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Sensex Slumps Over 1,300 Points as Market Breadth Weakens Amid Sector Divergence
item.description: Indian equity markets witnessed a sharp correction on 11 March 2026, with the Sensex plunging 1,307.59 points, or 1.63%, to close at 76,931.32. The Nifty also mirrored this weakness amid broad-based selling, led predominantly by the auto sector, while the pharma segment provided some respite. Market breadth remained weak, with declines outnumbering advances across the BSE500 universe, reflecting cautious investor sentiment amid mixed global cues. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Large-Cap Segment Faces Downward Pressure Amid Mixed Sector Trends
item.description: The large-cap segment, represented by the BSE 100 index, has experienced notable weakness over recent sessions, declining by 1.46% today and registering a sharper 3.3% drop over the past five days. While the broader market grapples with this downturn, select heavyweight stocks and defensive names have demonstrated resilience, highlighting a divergence in sectoral performance within the large-cap universe. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Small-Cap Segment Sees Marginal Decline Amid Mixed Technical Upgrades
item.description: The small-cap segment, as represented by the BSE SMALLCAP 250 index, experienced a marginal decline of 0.03% on 11 Mar 2026, continuing a subdued trend with a 0.73% drop over the past five trading days. Despite this, select stocks within the segment delivered notable returns, highlighting a mixed performance landscape characterised by narrow breadth and sector-specific divergences. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: HDFC Asset Management Company Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure
item.description: HDFC Asset Management Company Ltd experienced a notable decline today, touching an intraday low of Rs 2,452.9, reflecting a 3.23% drop as the stock underperformed both its sector and the broader market amid prevailing bearish sentiment. Time: 21 minutes ago

item.title: Thirumalai Chemicals Ltd Surges to Intraday High on 8% Gain
item.description: Thirumalai Chemicals Ltd demonstrated robust intraday performance on 11 Mar 2026, surging to an intraday high of Rs 183, marking an 8.9% increase. This notable rise contrasts sharply with the broader market’s decline, underscoring the stock’s relative strength amid a bearish Sensex environment. Time: 21 minutes ago

item.title: Mukta Arts Ltd Stock Hits 52-Week Low Amidst Weak Fundamentals
item.description: Mukta Arts Ltd has declined to a fresh 52-week low, closing near ₹47.34, marking a significant downturn in its stock performance over the past year. This new low reflects ongoing pressures within the Media & Entertainment sector and highlights the company’s current financial and market challenges. Time: 22 minutes ago

item.title: Oxford Industries Ltd Hits New 52-Week High of Rs.10.02
item.description: Oxford Industries Ltd reached a significant milestone today by hitting a new 52-week high of Rs.10.02, marking a notable moment in the stock’s recent performance amid a challenging broader market environment. Time: 30 minutes ago

item.title: Go Fashion (India) Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low Amid Continued Downtrend
item.description: Shares of Go Fashion (India) Ltd, a player in the Garments & Apparels sector, touched a new 52-week low of Rs.280 today, marking a significant decline amid a prolonged downtrend. The stock has now recorded a consecutive nine-day fall, accumulating a loss of 15.38% over this period, reflecting ongoing pressures within the company’s performance and broader market conditions. Time: 30 minutes ago
